zh-tw.title: 古裝陸劇金句語錄
zh-tw.description: 武俠、仙俠、宮廷、甜寵——那些一句就讓你想把整部劇重看一遍的古裝台詞，跨越朝代，說中了你藏在現代生活裡的深情

en.title: Chinese Period Drama Quotes & Lines
en.description: Wuxia, xianxia, palace intrigue, sweet romance — the costume-drama lines that make you want to rewatch the whole series, landing somewhere real beneath all the silk and swordplay

items.sourceNote: 古裝/仙俠虐戀台詞 register 參考（三生三世跨世記憶母題），內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這一世我認不出你，是因為上一世，我用盡了所有記得你的力氣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配古裝虐戀劇照、三生三世主題貼文，或寫給那個「兜兜轉轉還是你」的人。
variations: 三世輪迴，我只學會一件事——忘記你，比死還難。

en.content: If I don't recognize you in this life, it's because I spent every last breath of the last one remembering you.
en.editorNote: Pairs with a tragic period-drama still, or for captioning an "after everything, still you" post.
variations: Three lifetimes, and the only thing I ever learned was that forgetting you is harder than dying.

items.sourceNote: 武俠江湖豪情 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 人在江湖，刀劍我都能放下，唯獨放不下回頭看你的那一眼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠迷的個性簽名、配仗劍背影劇照，或形容「什麼都能割捨，就是放不下一個人」。
variations: 江湖那麼大，我偏偏在你站過的地方，多停了一會兒。

en.content: Out here in the jianghu I can lay down my blade — the only thing I can't put down is the urge to look back at you.
en.editorNote: A wuxia-fan bio line, or for that "I can give up anything but one person" feeling.
variations: The jianghu is wide, and yet I keep lingering exactly where you once stood.

items.sourceNote: 古裝甜寵霸道告白 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這天下我可以不要，但你站的這三尺之地，誰都別想搶。
zh-tw.editorNote: 甜寵劇截圖配字、霸總古裝風告白，或情人節給對方一個土到極致的安全感。
variations: 江山給別人去搶，我守著你這一個人就夠累了。

en.content: I'd hand over the whole empire without blinking — but the three feet of ground you're standing on, no one takes from me.
en.editorNote: For a sweet, possessive-confession caption, or handing someone over-the-top reassurance.
variations: Let the others fight over the kingdom — guarding just you already keeps me busy enough.

items.sourceNote: 仙俠虐戀犧牲母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我用一身修為換你三魂七魄回來，這筆交易，我從沒覺得虧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠虐劇名場面配字，或形容「為一個人付出全部還甘之如飴」。
variations: 神位我可以不坐，你回頭多看我一眼，比飛升更值得。

en.content: I traded a lifetime of cultivation to bring your soul back whole, and I have never once thought I lost that deal.
en.editorNote: For a xianxia-sacrifice scene, or that "gave everything and still call it worth it" mood.
variations: I'll give up my place among the gods — one more glance from you is worth more than ascension.

items.sourceNote: 宮廷權謀冷酷台詞 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 在這宮裡，眼淚是最不值錢的東西，能換命的，從來只有心狠。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮鬥劇語錄、職場暗示「別在辦公室哭，要狠」，或配冷宮夜景劇照。
variations: 在這深宮，先紅了眼眶的人，棋盤上已經先輸了一子。

en.content: In this palace, tears are the cheapest currency there is — the only thing that ever buys you a life is being colder than the next person.
en.editorNote: A palace-scheming line that doubles as office advice — don't cry at work, outlast them.
variations: In a palace this deep, whoever's eyes redden first has already lost a piece on the board.

items.sourceNote: 古裝等待守候 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你說的那句「等我回來」，我等成了城牆上的一塊磚，風吹雨打，也沒挪過位置。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合異地戀、長久守候，或配古城牆夕陽劇照的深情文案。
variations: 你走的那條路，我看了十年，看到路都長出了草，你還沒回來。

en.content: You said "wait for me" — and I waited until I'd become a brick in the city wall, weathered by every storm, never once moving.
en.editorNote: For long-distance love and the ache of waiting, or a sunset-on-the-city-wall caption.
variations: I watched the road you left by for ten years — long enough for grass to grow over it, and still you hadn't come back.

items.sourceNote: 久別重逢母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 再見面那一刻，我認出你不是靠這張臉，是靠我心口那道，一直沒好的舊傷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 久別重逢、舊情復燃主題，或形容「忘了長相也忘不了感覺」。
variations: 人海那麼擠，我偏偏先聽見你的聲音，再看見你的人。

en.content: When we met again I knew you — not by your face, but by the old wound in my chest that had never quite healed.
en.editorNote: For reunions and rekindled love — when you forgot the face but never the feeling.
variations: In a crowd that thick, I heard your voice before I ever saw your face.

items.sourceNote: 武俠/仙俠「守蒼生 vs 守你」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們要我守天下蒼生，可我提劍那一刻想的，只有護住身後那一個你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠/仙俠英雄配字、「大義與私情」主題，或寫給「全世界與你之間我選你」。
variations: 天下是大家的，可我這把劍，只認得護你一個的方向。

en.content: They told me to protect all living things — but the moment I drew my sword, the only soul on my mind was the one standing behind me.
en.editorNote: For the hero torn between the world and one person — and choosing the person.
variations: The world belongs to everyone — but my blade only ever learned one direction: yours.

items.sourceNote: 「紅顏彈指老」年華易逝母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 紅顏彈指間就老了，可你笑起來的那一瞬，我願意拿往後所有的白髮去換。
zh-tw.editorNote: 唯美傷感主題、配落花劇照，或感嘆時光與愛情。
variations: 芳華再美也留不住，留得住的，是你轉頭看我的那一下。

en.content: Beauty fades in the space of a snap — but for the instant you smiled, I'd trade every grey hair still to come.
en.editorNote: A wistful line on time and beauty — pairs with falling-petals imagery.
variations: No splendor stays — except the half-second you turned your head to look at me.

items.sourceNote: 「不求三生三世只求一世」白首之約 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我不求三生三世，只求一世；這一世裡，柴米油鹽都和你一起算。
zh-tw.editorNote: 婚禮、長久承諾主題，把仙俠的「三生三世」拉回人間煙火。
variations: 別人要轟轟烈烈，我只想和你慢慢變老，連吵架都吵到滿頭白髮。

en.content: I'm not asking for three lifetimes, just one — and in this one, I want to split even the rice and firewood with you.
en.editorNote: For weddings and down-to-earth promises — pulling "three lifetimes" back to everyday life.
variations: Let others want the grand and the tragic — I just want to grow old slowly with you, bickering all the way to grey.

items.sourceNote: 「江山與美人」宮廷虐戀母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 龍椅冷得很，坐上去那天我才懂，我要的從來不是這個位置，是當初陪我數星星的那個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮廷虐劇、「得到一切卻失去那個人」主題，或職場「升上去卻空了」之感。
variations: 我登上了所有人仰望的高處，卻沒人再肯陪我，蹲下來看一朵花。

en.content: The throne is a cold place to sit; the day I finally took it, I understood I'd never wanted the seat — I'd wanted the person who used to count stars with me.
en.editorNote: For the "won everything, lost the one" arc — or the hollow feeling at the top.
variations: I climbed to the height everyone looks up to, and no one will crouch down with me to look at a single flower anymore.

items.sourceNote: 初見/命定相遇母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 初見那一眼，我以為只是路過；後來才知道，那是我這輩子最遠的一段路，走了好久好久，才走到你面前。
zh-tw.editorNote: 初戀、命中註定主題，配初見劇照，或寫給「繞了很遠才遇見的人」。
variations: 你只是抬頭看了我一眼，我卻把那一眼，記了一整個朝代。

en.content: At first glance I thought I was only passing by; only later did I realize it was the longest road of my life, and it took me years to finally reach you.
en.editorNote: For first-sight, fated-meeting captions — for the person it took a lifetime to reach.
variations: You only looked up at me once — and I kept that one look for an entire dynasty.

items.sourceNote: 古風土味情話 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我夜觀天象，發現姑娘你印堂發亮——那是我把心裡的燈，全點給你了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古風土味情話、曖昧期撩人用，把古裝梗玩成現代搭訕。
variations: 在下走遍江湖，獨缺一位押寨夫人——這個職位，只為姑娘你保留。

en.content: I read the stars tonight and found your brow strangely bright — that's just the lanterns of my whole heart, all lit for you.
en.editorNote: A period-flavored cheesy pickup line — wuxia gimmick turned modern flirt.
variations: This humble wanderer has crossed the whole jianghu, lacking only one thing — a partner for the stronghold, a post I've kept open for you alone.

items.sourceNote: 追劇自嘲 meta register 參考，內容為原創

zh-tw.content: 我跟人說古裝劇都是套路：誤會、虐戀、大團圓——然後我為了那個大團圓，又熬了一個通宵。
zh-tw.editorNote: 追劇族自嘲、配「明明知道結局還是哭」貼文，輕鬆收尾用。
variations: 古裝劇的男主都會武功，我的男主只會在我熬夜追劇時，問我明天不用上班嗎。

en.content: I keep telling people period dramas are all formula — misunderstanding, tragic love, happy ending — and then I stay up all night for that happy ending anyway.
en.editorNote: Self-deprecating binge humor — for the "knew the ending, cried anyway" post.
variations: Period-drama leads all know kung fu; mine only knows how to ask, mid-binge, whether I have work tomorrow.

items.sourceNote: 「順境逆境唯你不變」知己真情母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 從前眾人捧著我的時候，只有你敢潑我冷水；如今眾人踩著我的時候，也只有你，還站在我這一邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 知己/患難真情主題，配兄弟情或愛情皆可，「順境逆境都是你」。
variations: 我風光時你不奉承，我落魄時你不走——這世上能這樣對我的，就你一個。

en.content: Back when everyone fawned over me, you were the only one who dared throw cold water; now that everyone tramples me, you're still the only one standing on my side.
en.editorNote: For ride-or-die loyalty — through the highs and the lows, still you.
variations: You didn't flatter me at my height and didn't leave me at my lowest — there's exactly one person in this world like that, and it's you.

items.sourceNote: 「江湖再見」灑脫離別母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 江湖再見不必道別，喝完這碗酒，你走你的長安，我闖我的天涯，有緣的話，風會把我們吹回同一張桌子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 灑脫離別、旅人/自由主題，或朋友各奔東西時的祝福。
variations: 不說再見，是因為江湖夠大，大到我們總會再撞見一次。

en.content: No farewells in the jianghu — finish this cup, you ride for the capital, I'll roam the edge of the world, and if fate allows, the wind will blow us back to the same table.
en.editorNote: For free-spirited goodbyes — friends scattering, trusting the road to bring them back.
variations: I won't say goodbye — the jianghu is big enough that we're bound to run into each other again.

items.sourceNote: 古裝立誓/山盟海誓母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我不會指著日月星辰發誓，那些太遠了；我只敢說，往後每一個天亮，我都還在你身邊醒來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合婚禮誓詞、長久承諾主題，或寫給「不講大話、只給日常」的那個人。
variations: 別人發的誓都驚天動地，我只想守一個小小的——明天，照樣替你留盞燈。

en.content: I won't swear by the sun, moon, and stars — they're too far away. All I dare promise is that every time the sky lights up, I'll still be waking up beside you.
en.editorNote: For wedding vows and forever-promises — for the person who skips grand words and just shows up daily.
variations: Other people swear earth-shaking oaths; I only want to keep one small one — tomorrow, I'll still leave a lamp on for you.

items.sourceNote: 古裝吃醋/獨佔 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你對誰笑都行，唯獨那一抹眼底的溫柔，本王要你只留給我一個人收。
zh-tw.editorNote: 甜寵吃醋名場面配字、霸總古裝風醋意告白，或情人之間半開玩笑的獨佔慾。
variations: 別人看你是看一幅畫，我看你，是看我這輩子唯一捨不得讓人多看的那幅。

en.content: Smile at whoever you like — but that one bit of softness in your eyes, I'll have you save it for me alone.
en.editorNote: For a jealous sweet-romance scene, or playful possessiveness between two people.
variations: To everyone else you're a painting to admire; to me you're the one painting I can't stand to let anyone else look at too long.

items.sourceNote: 古裝離別家書 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這封信你若收到，我大概已經回不去了；別等了，但若你偶爾抬頭看見月亮，那就是我又偷偷回來看你一眼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝戰場/生離死別主題，配家書、孤月劇照，或寫給再也見不到的人。
variations: 紙短情長，我把想說的話都寫進了月光裡，怕你哭，所以不敢寫太滿。

en.content: If this letter reaches you, I'm probably never coming home. Don't wait for me — but if you happen to look up and see the moon, that's just me sneaking back to see you one more time.
en.editorNote: For a battlefield farewell or a final letter — pairs with a lone-moon still.
variations: The paper is short and the longing long, so I hid most of what I meant in the moonlight — afraid you'd cry, I didn't dare fill the page.

items.sourceNote: 宮廷權謀機鋒對白 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你以為遞上來的是茶，其實是試探；你以為我喝下去的是茶，其實是讓你以為我沒看穿。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮鬥機鋒名場面配字，或職場暗示「看穿了也別急著拆穿」。
variations: 在這宮裡，笑得最甜的那杯茶，往往最該先放涼了看清楚再喝。

en.content: You think what you handed me is tea — it's a test. You think what I drank is tea — it's me letting you believe I never saw through you.
en.editorNote: A palace-scheming exchange, doubling as office wisdom — seeing through someone isn't the same as exposing them.
variations: In this palace, the sweetest cup of tea is usually the one you should let cool and look at twice before you drink.

items.sourceNote: 「為你變溫柔」冷面角色破功母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 三界都怕我手裡這把劍，只有你不怕——大概是因為，到了你面前，我自己先把劍尖收了起來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 冷面高手/仙尊在愛人面前破功主題，配甜寵反差劇照，或形容「對全世界冷，只對你軟」。
variations: 他們說我心硬如鐵，可你一靠近，我那身鎧甲就自己鬆了一塊。

en.content: All three realms fear this sword in my hand — everyone but you. Probably because the moment I'm in front of you, I lower the blade myself.
en.editorNote: For the cold-hero-goes-soft trope — icy to the whole world, gentle only with you.
variations: They say my heart is iron, but the second you come close, a plate of my armor loosens all on its own.

items.sourceNote: 錦繡芳華女性自信金句「天下浩闊，並非只有一人可愛，只一事可求」register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 天地這麼大，值得愛的人何止一個，值得做的事何止一件——別把整片天，縮成一個人的影子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 大女主自我成長、走出一段感情、鼓勵自己往前走時用，配花開或遠景劇照。
variations: 這世上能讓我心動的東西多得是，沒道理為了一個轉身就走的人，把自己困在原地。

en.content: The world is wide — there's more than one person worth loving, more than one thing worth doing. Don't shrink a whole sky down to one person's shadow.
en.editorNote: For self-growth, moving on from a relationship, or hyping yourself forward — pairs with a blooming-flower or wide-vista still.
variations: There's plenty in this world that can move my heart; no reason to trap myself in place for someone who turned and walked away.

items.sourceNote: 錦繡芳華「有選擇時為自己而活」自主母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 很多時候我們是沒得選；可一旦有得選，我寧願選一條為自己而走的路，也不要在原地，跟人互相為難。
zh-tw.editorNote: 鼓勵自己做決定、追求獨立的主題，配大女主獨行背影，或寫給正在人生岔路上的人。
variations: 命運給的牌我認，但怎麼出，得我自己說了算。

en.content: A lot of the time we don't get a choice. But the moment I do, I'd rather walk a road of my own than stand still making life hard for each other.
en.editorNote: For owning your decisions and chasing independence — for someone standing at a crossroads.
variations: I'll take the hand fate dealt me, but how I play it is mine to call.

items.sourceNote: 2025 仙俠劇（七夜雪/水龍吟）悲劇美學「以命續命」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這條命本來就是撿來的，拿去換你多活一個雪季，怎麼算都是我賺了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠悲劇、以命相護名場面配字，或形容「為一個人豁出去還覺得值」。
variations: 你別替我可惜，我自己心裡有桿秤——換你一個冬天，比我活十年都重。

en.content: This life of mine was borrowed to begin with — trading it so you get one more winter, any way I count it, I come out ahead.
en.editorNote: For a xianxia tragedy or a life-for-life sacrifice scene — that "threw myself in and still call it worth it" feeling.
variations: Don't waste your pity on me; I keep my own scales, and one winter of yours outweighs ten years of mine.

items.sourceNote: 古裝結義/兄弟情「生死與共」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們沒同年同月生，但這碗酒喝下去，往後刀山火海，我陪你一起跳；你要是先走一步，黃泉路上記得等我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 結義兄弟、生死之交主題，配舉杯或並肩劇照，也適合送給過命交情的好友。
variations: 這條命你要是用得上，儘管開口，兄弟兩個字，從來不是說著好聽的。

en.content: We weren't born the same day — but once we drain this cup, through every blade and every fire, I'm jumping in with you; and if you go first, wait for me on the road below.
en.editorNote: For sworn-brother, ride-or-die friendship — pairs with a raised-cup or side-by-side still; works for a true best friend too.
variations: If this life of mine is ever of use to you, just say the word — "brothers" was never a pretty word to us, it was a promise.

items.sourceNote: 仙俠甜虐「魔尊×小仙女被迫綁在一起」強制同行母題（蒼蘭訣 register）參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 本尊修魔千年，從沒怕過任何東西，偏偏被你這條命綁住——更氣人的是，綁久了，我竟然不想解開。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠歡喜冤家、強制同行/雙向奔赴主題，配甜虐反差劇照，或形容「本來嫌棄，後來離不開」。
variations: 我發誓要報復你害我被綁住的這筆帳，結果一抬頭，發現我捨不得的人，還是你。

en.content: A thousand years cultivating dark arts and I feared nothing — then your life got tied to mine, and what infuriates me most is that, after a while, I stopped wanting to cut the knot.
en.editorNote: For the enemies-to-lovers, forced-proximity xianxia trope — that "couldn't stand you, now can't leave you" arc.
variations: I swore I'd get even for being chained to you — then I looked up and realized the one I couldn't bear to lose was still you.

items.sourceNote: 唐代宮廷探案劇「案件帶劇情」推理機鋒 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這世上沒有不留痕跡的謊，只有還沒被翻到那一頁的人；你藏得再深，總會在某個你以為安全的地方，露出一根線頭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝探案/推理名場面配字，或職場暗示「破綻遲早會被看見」，配燭光卷宗劇照。
variations: 真相不會自己走出來，但它很有耐心——它只是在等一個願意一頁一頁翻下去的人。

en.content: No lie leaves no trace — there's only the page no one has turned to yet; however deep you bury it, somewhere you thought was safe, a loose thread always shows.
en.editorNote: For a period-mystery deduction scene, or office subtext that a slip will surface eventually — pairs with a candlelit-case-file still.
variations: The truth won't walk out on its own, but it's patient — it just waits for someone willing to turn the pages one by one.

items.sourceNote: 「人世間所有的相遇，都是久別重逢」一代宗師名句 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 人說一見如故，我倒覺得是久別重逢——我們不是第一次見面，只是在很久很久以前，走散了一回。
zh-tw.editorNote: 命定相遇、一見如故主題，配雪景或江湖偶遇劇照，或寫給「感覺早就認識」的那個人。
variations: 不是相見恨晚，是這一程的路，我們本來就該在某個渡口，再撞見彼此一次。

en.content: People call it love at first sight; I'd call it a long-overdue reunion — this wasn't our first meeting, we just lost each other a very long time ago.
en.editorNote: For fated, instant-familiarity meetings — pairs with a snowfall or chance-encounter still; for the person you felt you'd always known.
variations: It's not that we met too late — it's that somewhere on this road, at some river crossing, we were always meant to run into each other again.

items.sourceNote: 甄嬛傳「別人如何輕賤你都不要緊，重要的是別輕賤了自己」自尊母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 別人怎麼看輕你，那是他們的事；你只要記得一件事——無論落到多低的地方，都別跟著一起，看輕了自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮鬥大女主、自尊自強主題，配低谷後重新站起的劇照，或寫給正被人小看的自己。
variations: 人言可畏，可真正能壓垮你的，從來不是別人的嘴，是你自己先點了頭。

en.content: How others look down on you is their business; just remember one thing — no matter how low you fall, never join them in thinking little of yourself.
en.editorNote: For palace-heroine self-respect and resilience — pairs with a back-on-her-feet still; for when someone's underestimating you.
variations: Gossip can be cruel, but what actually breaks you was never other people's mouths — it's the moment you nod along.

items.sourceNote: 陳情令「正邪不在道而在心」仙魔界線母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們說你是魔，我偏不信；走的是哪條道我不管，我只看一個人心裡，還亮不亮著一盞燈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠正邪不分、為愛人正名主題，配世人誤解、唯獨一人相信的劇照，或寫給「全世界都誤會你、我懂你」。
variations: 正道魔道我分不清，我只認得——你回頭看我的時候，眼神從來不像個壞人。

en.content: They call you a demon; I refuse to believe it. I don't care which path you walk — I only watch whether there's still a lamp lit inside a person's heart.
en.editorNote: For the xianxia "good and evil aren't a side, they're a heart" theme — for the one the whole world misjudges but you understand.
variations: I can't tell the righteous path from the dark one — I only know that when you turn to look at me, your eyes have never once looked like a villain's.

items.sourceNote: 「封總凌BOSS寵妻宣言」霸總寵妻 register 移植到古裝，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 整座王府的規矩都是我立的，可從你進門那天起，我給自己加了一條——這一生，凡事先問過你高不高興。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝霸總寵妻名場面配字、甜寵劇截圖，或寫給「全世界都聽我的，我只聽你的」那個人。
variations: 我說一不二慣了，唯獨對你，永遠留著一句「你說了算」。

en.content: Every rule in this manor was written by me — but from the day you walked in, I added one more: for the rest of my life, I ask whether you're happy first.
en.editorNote: For a period-drama doting-husband scene, or for the "everyone answers to me, I answer to you" person.
variations: I'm used to having the final word on everything — except with you, where I always keep one line ready: whatever you say.

items.sourceNote: 九重紫等宅鬥重生劇「重活一世改寫命運」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 上一世我把所有的好都給了不值得的人，這一世我學乖了——先把自己護好，剩下的好，才輪得到別人來搶。
zh-tw.editorNote: 重生宅鬥大女主、重新做人主題，配重生覺醒劇照，或寫給「這次先愛自己」的自己。
variations: 命運給過我一次重來，我沒打算再走回那條讓我哭著醒來的老路。

en.content: Last life I gave all my best to people who never deserved it; this life I've wised up — I guard myself first, and whatever's left over, then others can fight for it.
en.editorNote: For a rebirth/mansion-intrigue heroine starting over — pairs with an awakening still; for the "this time, me first" you.
variations: Fate handed me one do-over, and I'm not about to walk back down the road that left me waking up in tears.

items.sourceNote: 「一世不敢放縱感情」隱忍壓抑深情母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這一生風光體面，唯獨對你，連多看一眼都要算著分寸——不是不愛，是愛得太深，深到不敢讓人看出半分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮廷/權貴隱忍深情主題，配壓抑對視劇照，或形容「最深的喜歡，藏在最克制的表情裡」。
variations: 別人的情話說得響，我的喜歡卻只敢悶在心裡——怕一出口，就護不住你了。

en.content: My whole life looks poised and proper — except with you, where even a second glance has to be measured. It isn't that I don't love you; I love you so deeply I don't dare let it show.
en.editorNote: For repressed, high-stakes longing — pairs with a restrained-eye-contact still; the deepest feeling hidden in the most careful face.
variations: Other people say their sweet words out loud; mine I only dare keep buried — afraid that the moment it's spoken, I can no longer keep you safe.

items.sourceNote: 「照鏡辭」雙魂同存設定 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我身體裡住著另一個魂，可奇怪的是，無論換哪一個出來，喜歡你這件事，從來沒換過班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 雙魂同存/奇幻設定甜虐主題，配鏡像劇照，或寫給「不管我是哪一面，愛你都不變」。
variations: 他們爭著占用這具身體，唯一不爭的，是誰更喜歡你——因為那一點，我們兩個剛好一樣。

en.content: There's another soul living inside me — but the strange thing is, no matter which of us comes out, loving you is the one shift neither of us ever clocks off from.
en.editorNote: For a twin-soul/body-sharing fantasy romance — pairs with a mirror still; "whichever side of me it is, loving you stays the same."
variations: They fight over who gets to use this body — the one thing they never fight over is who loves you more, because on that, the two of us happen to agree.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝甜寵新劇「平凡日常勝過盛大承諾」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我給不了你滿城的花燈，可我能保證——每個下雨的夜裡，這扇門後頭，永遠有一盞為你留的燈和一碗熱湯。
zh-tw.editorNote: 古裝甜寵日常主題，把盛大承諾換成柴米油鹽，配雨夜歸家劇照，或寫給「不要驚天動地、只要你回家」的人。
variations: 別人許你江山萬里，我只敢許你一件小事——往後再晚，我都等你吃完飯再睡。

en.content: I can't give you a city full of lanterns, but I can promise you this — on every rainy night, behind this door there'll always be a lamp left on for you and a bowl of hot soup.
en.editorNote: For a cozy period-romance everyday theme — grand vows swapped for warm small ones; pairs with a coming-home-in-the-rain still.
variations: Others may promise you ten thousand miles of empire; I only dare promise one small thing — however late it gets, I'll wait for you to finish eating before I sleep.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）謝征「我不怕死，只怕我死了沒人護你」深情守護母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這條命，從上戰場那天起就不太在乎了；唯一怕的是哪天我真倒下了，這世上就再沒一個人，會擋在你前面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世深情、生死守護主題，配雪地或戰場劇照，或寫給「我不怕苦，只怕沒辦法再保護你」的人。
variations: 刀架在脖子上我都能笑，唯獨想到你以後沒人護著，我才第一次覺得，死是件可惜的事。

en.content: I stopped caring much about my own life the day I first marched to war; the only thing that scares me is that one day I'll fall, and there'll be no one left in this world to stand in front of you.
en.editorNote: For wartime devotion and life-or-death protectiveness — pairs with a snowfield or battlefield still; for the "I don't fear hardship, only failing to protect you" feeling.
variations: I can smile with a blade at my throat — it's only the thought of you left unguarded that ever made dying feel like a waste.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）樊長玉「我殺豬養你」市井直球告白母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 別人家姑娘許你詩詞歌賦，我這雙手只會殺豬剁肉——可你要是肯留下，這條街最肥的那塊肉，我天天留給你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 市井大女主直球告白、甜寵反差主題，配屠戶/煙火氣劇照，或寫給「不會講漂亮話、只會實實在在養你」的人。
variations: 我不懂什麼海誓山盟，我只知道——你要是餓著，是我這個當家的沒本事。

en.content: Other girls promise you poetry and song; these two hands of mine only know how to slaughter hogs and chop meat — but if you'll stay, I'll save you the best cut on this whole street, every single day.
en.editorNote: For a down-to-earth heroine's blunt confession — pairs with a butcher-shop, everyday-life still; for the one who can't say pretty things but will genuinely take care of you.
variations: I don't know any grand vows over sea and mountain — I only know that if you ever go hungry, that's on me, the one running this household.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）「吃好睡好活下去」亂世人間清醒母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這世道再亂，仇再大，日子也得一頓一頓地過——先把飯吃飽，把覺睡好，好好活著，才有資格談以後。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世人間清醒、好好活著主題，配市井煙火或低谷劇照，或寫給「先照顧好自己，其他再說」的自己。
variations: 天塌下來也得先吃飯——活著的人，才有機會把帳一筆一筆討回來。

en.content: However broken the times, however deep the grudge, life still has to be lived one meal at a time — eat your fill, sleep well, stay alive first; only then have you earned the right to talk about what comes next.
en.editorNote: For grounded, survive-first wisdom — pairs with an everyday-life or rock-bottom still; for the "take care of yourself first, the rest later" you.
variations: Even if the sky falls, you eat first — only the living ever get the chance to settle the score, one debt at a time.

items.sourceNote: 凡人修仙傳「縱使蹉跎一生，也要爭那一線天機」苟道修仙逆襲母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我沒有驚天的資質，也沒有顯赫的師門，可哪怕熬上一輩子，我也要從那萬中無一的縫隙裡，替自己爭出一條活路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠平凡逆襲、苟住也要往上爬主題，配孤身修行劇照，或寫給「沒有背景、只能靠自己拼」的人。
variations: 別人飛升靠的是天賦，我靠的是不肯認命——這一線生機，我用半輩子也要把它攥住。

en.content: I've no heaven-shaking talent and no famous master behind me — but even if it takes a whole lifetime, I'll claw a way out for myself through that one-in-ten-thousand crack.
en.editorNote: For the ordinary-underdog-ascends theme — survive, then climb; pairs with a lone-cultivation still; for the no-connections, all-grit person.
variations: Others ascend on talent; I rise on refusing to accept my lot — and that one sliver of a chance, I'll spend half a lifetime gripping it tight.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）「你才是那塊羊脂白玉」以物喻人珍視母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這輩子見過的好東西不少，金的玉的都過過手——可真正捨不得放下、想揣在懷裡護一輩子的，從來就只有你一個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 以物喻人、珍視愛人主題，配定情信物或溫柔對視劇照，或寫給「見過世面，最後只認定你」的人。
variations: 這天底下值錢的東西多了去，我偏偏只想守著一件不能用銀子買的——就是你。

en.content: I've seen plenty of fine things in this life, handled my share of gold and jade — but the only one I can't bear to set down, the one I'd hold close and guard for a lifetime, has always been you.
en.editorNote: For the "comparing you to something precious" theme — pairs with a love-token or tender-gaze still; for the one who's seen the world and still chose only you.
variations: There's no shortage of priceless things under heaven, and yet the only one I want to keep is the one no silver can buy — you.

items.sourceNote: 金庸「俠之大者，為國為民」家國俠義母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這身武功不是練來逞威風的；真正的高手，劍是替護不住自己的人擋下來的，不是拿去嚇唬比他弱的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠俠義、為弱者出頭主題，配仗劍護民劇照，或寫給「有能力就該護著該護的人」的信念。
variations: 招式練到頂也只是個會打架的；肯為素不相識的人擋一刀，才配得上一個俠字。

en.content: I didn't train all this skill just to show off — a real master raises his blade to block what others can't shield themselves from, not to frighten anyone weaker than him.
en.editorNote: For wuxia chivalry and standing up for the weak — pairs with a sword-defending-the-people still; for the "if you have the power, protect who needs it" creed.
variations: Master every technique and you're still just good at fighting; only taking a blade for a stranger earns you the name of a hero.

items.sourceNote: 金庸「有人的地方就有江湖」人即江湖母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你說想退出江湖——傻孩子，只要還有人的地方，就有恩怨，就有人心；你退得出這座山，退不出人這個字。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠人間清醒、看透人情世故主題，配下山或市井劇照，或暗喻「職場/社會本身就是江湖，躲不掉」。
variations: 江湖不在刀光劍影裡，在每一桌的人情往來裡——你以為你下了山，其實只是換了個江湖。

en.content: You say you want to leave the jianghu — child, wherever there are people, there are grudges and there are hearts to read; you can walk out of these mountains, but never out of being among people.
en.editorNote: For wuxia worldly-wisdom and seeing through human nature — pairs with a leaving-the-mountain or marketplace still; subtext that the office and society are their own jianghu you can't escape.
variations: The jianghu isn't in the flash of blades — it's in the favors and grudges at every table; you think you came down off the mountain, but you only traded one jianghu for another.

items.sourceNote: 天龍八部「莫若相忘於江湖」放下執念灑脫母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 與其在天涯兩端，夜夜思君思到天明，倒不如把彼此都放回各自的江湖——記著太苦，那就讓風，把這個名字慢慢吹淡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 放下一段感情、學會釋懷主題，配遠行背影或落花劇照，或寫給「想念太重，乾脆學著放手」的自己。
variations: 有些人不是不愛了，是愛著太累；轉身把你還給人海，也算是我對自己的一點慈悲。

en.content: Better than aching for you till dawn from opposite ends of the world is to set each other loose back into our own jianghu — remembering hurts too much, so let the wind slowly blow the name faint.
en.editorNote: For letting go of a relationship and learning to make peace — pairs with a walking-away or falling-petals still; for the "the longing's too heavy, so I'll learn to release it" you.
variations: Some people don't stop loving — they just love until it's exhausting; turning around and giving you back to the crowd is the small mercy I owe myself.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝喜劇「鹹魚飛升」躺平修仙反差幽默 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 別人渡劫是劈天打雷九死一生，我渡劫的最大難關是——能不能在飛升前，先睡飽這一覺。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠喜劇/躺平修仙反差幽默，配懶散修仙劇照，或自嘲「別人拚命我擺爛，照樣慢慢往上爬」。
variations: 師父說修仙要勤勉精進，我點頭如搗蒜——然後翻個身，繼續閉關（睡覺）。

en.content: For everyone else, surviving the tribulation means splitting skies and dodging lightning; for me the real trial is whether I can get one good nap in before I ascend.
en.editorNote: For lazy-cultivation comedy and slacker-vs-grind humor — pairs with a slacking-immortal still; the self-deprecating "everyone hustles, I coast, and somehow still climb" mood.
variations: Master says cultivation demands diligence and drive; I nod hard in agreement — then roll over and resume my secluded training (napping).

items.sourceNote: 「最了解你的不是朋友而是敵人」對手機鋒母題 register 移植到古裝權謀，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這滿朝文武，最懂我的不是那些遞茶捧硯的，而是你這個一心要扳倒我的人——畢竟你研究我，比我自己還用功。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮廷權謀、棋逢敵手主題，配朝堂對峙劇照，或職場暗示「最了解你的往往是對手」。
variations: 朋友看我的好，敵人看我的破綻——所以這滿城裡，反倒是你最捨不得我太早出局。

en.content: In this whole court, the one who understands me best isn't the flatterers pouring my tea — it's you, the one bent on bringing me down; after all, you've studied me harder than I study myself.
en.editorNote: For palace intrigue and a worthy-rival dynamic — pairs with a courtroom-standoff still; office subtext that your rival often knows you best.
variations: Friends watch for my strengths; an enemy watches for my cracks — which is why, in this whole city, you're oddly the one least willing to see me out of the game too soon.

items.sourceNote: 香蜜沉沉燼如霜「你可曾愛過我？從未」三世虐戀母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你問我可曾愛過你，我搖頭說從未——不是不愛，是怕一旦點頭，這三世的眼淚就再也收不回去了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠三世虐戀名場面配字，或形容「嘴上說不愛，是怕說了真愛就崩潰」，配雨中對峙劇照。
variations: 我說從未愛過你，是這輩子撒過最重、也最捨不得的一個謊。

en.content: You asked if I ever loved you, and I shook my head and said never — not because I didn't, but because the moment I nodded, three lifetimes of tears would never go back where they came from.
en.editorNote: For a three-lives tragic-romance scene, or the "said I never loved you because admitting it would break me" mood — pairs with a rain-standoff still.
variations: Saying I never loved you was the heaviest lie I've ever told — and the one I least wanted to.

items.sourceNote: 帝王孤獨「一世榮華、一世提心弔膽、無人換一聲冬郎」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我坐上了萬人之上的位子，從此沒人再敢直呼我的小名——這天下都對我俯首，卻再沒一個人，肯把我當成一個普通人來疼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 帝王孤獨、高處不勝寒主題，配龍袍獨坐劇照，或形容「站得越高，越沒人把你當人看」。
variations: 他們跪著喊我萬歲，可我真正想聽的，是有人不顧規矩，輕輕喊一聲我的名字。

en.content: I took the seat above ten thousand men, and from then on no one dared call me by my childhood name — the whole world bows to me, and not a single person is left who'll love me as just an ordinary man.
en.editorNote: For an emperor's loneliness and the cold at the top — pairs with a lone-on-the-throne still; "the higher you stand, the less anyone treats you as a person."
variations: They kneel and shout long life to me, but what I really want to hear is someone breaking every rule just to softly say my name.

items.sourceNote: 東宮/周生如故「不負天下，唯負一人」將軍家國與私情母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這一生我守住了城、護住了天下，唯獨對不起一個人——對得起所有人的代價，是把你，一個人留在了城樓外的風裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 將軍/家國與私情兩難主題，配城樓或戰場劇照，或形容「做對了所有事，卻虧欠了最重要的那個人」。
variations: 史書會寫我是個好將軍，只有我自己知道，那一行字底下，壓著一個被我辜負了一輩子的名字。

en.content: All my life I held the city and shielded the realm — and wronged only one person; the price of being worthy to everyone was leaving you, alone, out in the wind beyond the gate.
en.editorNote: For the general torn between country and love — pairs with a city-wall or battlefield still; "did right by everyone and failed the one who mattered most."
variations: The histories will call me a good general; only I know that beneath that one line lies a name I failed for a lifetime.

items.sourceNote: 蒼蘭訣「魔尊重生只記得一人」失憶/輪迴甜虐母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們抹去了我的記憶，重練一遍我的魂，本以為這下乾乾淨淨——結果一睜眼，腦子裡空空蕩蕩的，卻偏偏給你留了個位子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠失憶/重生甜虐、雙向奔赴主題，配甦醒對視劇照，或形容「什麼都忘了，就是忘不了你」。
variations: 他們以為消去記憶就能斷了這段緣，沒想到我整個人空了，唯一沒空的那一角，寫的還是你的名字。

en.content: They wiped my memory and recast my whole soul, certain they'd left it spotless — then I opened my eyes, and amid all that emptiness in my head, there was somehow still a seat saved for you.
en.editorNote: For an amnesia/rebirth xianxia romance — pairs with a waking-up-eye-contact still; "forgot everything except you."
variations: They thought erasing my memory would cut the thread between us; instead I came back hollow, and the one corner that wasn't empty still spelled your name.

items.sourceNote: 知否/宅鬥「立身先正、不靠別人施捨」女性處世智慧母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這後宅裡的體面，從來不是別人賞的；你把腰桿挺直了，把分寸守住了，那些原本想踩你的人，自然就矮了一截。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宅鬥女性處世智慧、自立自強主題，配端莊持家劇照，或職場暗示「尊重要靠自己掙，不是等人給」。
variations: 靠人施捨的好日子過不長；唯有自己站得穩，這份體面才偷不走、也奪不去。

en.content: Standing in this household was never something others granted you; keep your back straight and your conduct in order, and the people who meant to step on you somehow come up short.
en.editorNote: For a mansion-intrigue heroine's worldly wisdom and self-reliance — pairs with a composed, in-charge still; office subtext that respect is earned, not handed to you.
variations: Good days that depend on someone's charity never last; only when you stand firm on your own can that dignity neither be stolen nor taken away.

items.sourceNote: 甄嬛傳「做人做事都要留有餘地，趕盡殺絕會自斷後路」處世智慧母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 做人做事都得留三分餘地——把路全堵死的那一刀，看著痛快，回頭你才發現，自己也站在沒有退路的那一邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮廷處世智慧、待人留餘地主題，配朝堂或對峙劇照，或職場暗示「別把事做絕，留條路給別人也給自己」。
variations: 趕盡殺絕從來不是本事，懂得在贏的那一刻收手，才是真的厲害。

en.content: In everything you do, leave a little room — the stroke that seals off every road looks satisfying, until you turn around and find you're the one standing with no way back.
en.editorNote: For palace worldly-wisdom on leaving room for others — pairs with a court or standoff still; office subtext to never push things to the brink, leave a path for them and for yourself.
variations: Cornering someone completely was never the real skill — knowing when to stop at the moment you've won, that's what takes strength.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）謝征壓抑深情承諾 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這人話少，能許的承諾也不多——但只要你願意留下，這亂世再翻幾次，我都會先把你護在我背後的那一寸地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世深情、寡言守護承諾主題，配並肩或雪地劇照，或寫給「不會說漂亮話、只用行動護你」的人。
variations: 我給不了你太平盛世，但我能保證——你身後那一步，永遠有我站著。

en.content: I'm not a man of many words, and I don't make many promises — but as long as you'll stay, however many times this broken world turns over, I'll keep you behind me, in the one patch of ground I'm guarding.
en.editorNote: For wartime devotion and a quiet man's promise — pairs with a side-by-side or snowfield still; for the one who skips pretty words and protects you through action.
variations: I can't give you an age of peace, but I can promise this — one step behind you, there will always be me, standing.

items.sourceNote: 尋秦記「時勢造英雄、肯動腦的人才有命改寫局面」穿越者職場智慧 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 亂世裡刀劍人人都有，真正能改命的，是肯比別人多想一步的腦子——力氣能贏一時，看得遠才贏得了一世。
zh-tw.editorNote: 穿越/權謀職場智慧、用腦不只用力主題，配運籌帷幄劇照，或職場暗示「埋頭苦幹不如先把局看懂」。
variations: 別人比拳頭，我比的是誰先看清這盤棋——畢竟蠻力誰都有，會算的人卻不多。

en.content: In troubled times everyone has a blade; what actually changes your fate is a mind willing to think one step further than the rest — strength wins the moment, but seeing far wins the whole game.
en.editorNote: For time-travel/strategy career wisdom — think, don't just grind; pairs with a master-strategist still; office subtext that heads-down effort loses to reading the board first.
variations: Others measure fists; I measure who reads the board first — anyone can bring brute force, but few know how to count the moves.

items.sourceNote: 甄嬛傳「整日清醒克制又有什麼用，我就不能醉一回嗎」壓抑後釋放母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我清醒克制了一輩子，把每一句話都掂量過、每一滴眼淚都嚥回去——就這麼一回，能不能准我糊塗一次，醉一場，痛痛快快地哭給自己看。
zh-tw.editorNote: 壓抑太久後的崩潰釋放主題，配獨飲或落淚劇照，或寫給「撐太久、想任性一次」的自己。
variations: 體面我守了夠久了，今晚這一場，我只想做回那個會哭會痛的普通人。

en.content: I've stayed clear-headed and restrained my whole life — weighing every word, swallowing every tear; just this once, can't I be allowed to lose my grip, to get drunk, to cry my heart out where only I can see.
en.editorNote: For the breakdown after holding it together too long — pairs with a drinking-alone or in-tears still; for the "held on too long, want to fall apart just once" you.
variations: I've kept up appearances long enough — tonight I just want to be the ordinary person again, the one who cries and hurts.

items.sourceNote: 武俠少年成長「先學會輸，才扛得住贏」師徒/成長母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 師父沒先教我怎麼贏，他先教我怎麼摔——摔得夠多、爬得夠快，等真正贏的那天到了，我才扛得住那份分量，不至於一贏就飄。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠成長/師徒主題，配練劍跌倒再起劇照，或寫給「先學會輸、才配談贏」的成長心態。
variations: 這一身本事不是贏出來的，是一次次跌進泥裡，再咬牙站起來，慢慢磨出來的。

en.content: My master didn't teach me how to win first — he taught me how to fall; fall enough times, get up fast enough, and by the day a real win comes, I can carry its weight without letting it go to my head.
en.editorNote: For wuxia coming-of-age and master-disciple growth — pairs with a falling-then-rising training still; for the "learn to lose before you earn the right to win" mindset.
variations: This skill of mine wasn't won — it was ground out, one fall into the mud and one gritted-teeth rise at a time.

items.sourceNote: 甄嬛傳「容不容得下我是娘娘的氣度，能不能讓娘娘容下是我的本事」機鋒對白 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 您容不容得下我，那是您的氣度；能不能讓您不得不容下我，那是我的本事——這兩件事，從來不是同一回事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮鬥機鋒名場面配字，或職場暗示「靠實力讓人不得不接受你」，配朝堂或對峙劇照。
variations: 您高興與否我管不著，但要讓您挪不開我，這點我還是有把握的。

en.content: Whether you can stand me is a matter of your grace; whether I can leave you no choice but to stand me is a matter of my skill — and those two were never the same thing.
en.editorNote: For a palace-scheming exchange, or office subtext about making yourself impossible to dismiss on merit — pairs with a court or standoff still.
variations: Whether you're pleased isn't mine to manage; but making myself impossible to remove — that part I'm fairly sure of.

items.sourceNote: 一代宗師「念念不忘，必有迴響」執念與回應母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你心裡掛了夠久的那件事，遲早會在某個轉角等你——念得夠真，山就會回你一聲；沒回的那些，多半是你自己半路先鬆了手。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠勵志/堅持母題，配練功或遠行劇照，或寫給「只要不放手、總會有回音」的人。
variations: 你對著空山喊得夠久，總有一天，連風都會學會你那句話。

en.content: The thing you've carried in your heart long enough will, sooner or later, be waiting for you at some turn in the road — call out true enough and the mountains answer back; the calls that never returned are mostly the ones you let go of halfway.
en.editorNote: For wuxia perseverance — hold on and the echo comes; pairs with a training or long-journey still; for the "keep your grip and you'll get an answer" person.
variations: Call into the empty hills long enough, and one day even the wind will have learned your words.

items.sourceNote: 凡人修仙傳（2026 楊洋版）「凡人之軀逆天改命」修仙逆襲母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 天生神力的人渡劫像喝水，我這身凡胎，每往上爬一步都得拿命去填——可正因為來得這麼難，我才一寸都捨不得退。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠平凡逆襲、靠命拚出來的成長主題，配孤身修行或渡劫劇照，或寫給「沒天賦、只能咬牙硬撐」的人。
variations: 別人是被天選的，我是自己撿來的命——撿來的，才更知道每一口氣都金貴。

en.content: For those born with divine power, surviving the tribulation is like sipping water; in this mortal body of mine, every step up has to be paid for in blood — but because it came this hard, I won't give back an inch.
en.editorNote: For the ordinary-mortal-ascends theme — climbing on grit, not gifts; pairs with a lone-cultivation or tribulation still; for the no-talent, sheer-willpower person.
variations: Others were chosen by heaven; I scraped my own life together — and what you scrape together, you learn to treasure breath by breath.

items.sourceNote: 玉茗茶骨（2026）大女主經商題材「茶要慢養、人要久處」沉得住氣母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 好茶不是搶來的，是養出來的；做生意也好，看人也罷——沉得住氣的那個，才熬得到別人露底牌的那一刻。
zh-tw.editorNote: 大女主經商/處世智慧、沉穩耐心主題，配製茶或談生意劇照，或職場暗示「沉得住氣才看得到全局」。
variations: 急著出價的人最先輸；我這杯茶慢慢泡著，等的就是你坐不住的那一下。

en.content: Fine tea isn't snatched, it's coaxed out slowly; in business or in reading people, it's the one who can keep their nerve who outlasts the rest until they show their hand.
en.editorNote: For a businesswoman-heroine's patience and composure — pairs with a tea-brewing or negotiation still; office subtext that keeping your cool lets you see the whole board.
variations: Whoever rushes to name a price loses first; I'll let this cup steep slowly — what I'm waiting for is the moment you can't sit still.

items.sourceNote: 藏海傳（2026）「藏得越深、等得越久，才扳得回這一局」隱忍復仇布局母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我把所有的恨都壓進心底最深的地方，笑著替你斟酒、替你磨墨——不是我忘了，是我在等一個，連你都來不及反應的時辰。
zh-tw.editorNote: 權謀隱忍布局、復仇蓄勢主題，配表面恭順暗藏鋒芒的劇照，或形容「沉默不是認輸，是在等最好的時機」。
variations: 我蟄伏這麼多年，不是怕你，是想等你真把我當自己人那天，再讓你看清我是誰。

en.content: I pressed every ounce of hatred into the deepest place in my heart, smiling as I poured your wine and ground your ink — not because I forgot, but because I'm waiting for an hour even you won't have time to react to.
en.editorNote: For a long-game revenge and patient-scheming theme — pairs with an outwardly-deferential, inwardly-sharp still; "silence isn't surrender, it's waiting for the perfect moment."
variations: I lay low all these years not out of fear of you, but to wait for the day you truly count me as your own — and only then let you see who I am.

items.sourceNote: 慕胥辭（2026 迪麗熱巴）「活了四百年的鬼王」漫長壽命 vs 凡人短暫深情母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我活了四百年，看慣了花開又謝、人來又走；可偏偏是你這短短一生，讓我第一次怕起時間走得太快。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠志怪、長生者愛上凡人的時間落差主題，配孤身千年的角色劇照，或寫給「遇見你才開始怕時間」的深情感。
variations: 別人怕老，我怕的是——我這麼長的命，最後只剩你這一段，是真正活過的。

en.content: I've lived four hundred years, watched flowers bloom and wither and people come and go; and yet it's your one short life that, for the first time, makes me afraid of how fast time moves.
en.editorNote: For the immortal-loves-a-mortal time-gap theme — pairs with a centuries-alone character still; for the "only after meeting you did I start fearing time" feeling.
variations: Others fear growing old; what I fear is that out of this long, long life of mine, your short chapter is the only stretch I'll have truly lived.

items.sourceNote: 折腰（2026 宋祖兒）「代姐聯姻、亂世先婚後愛」政治聯姻轉真心母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 這樁婚事一開始，對你我都只是一筆交易；可日子過著過著，我竟在那些算計裡，先一步把心給算了進去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 先婚後愛、政治聯姻轉真心主題，配紅蓋頭或並肩劇照，或寫給「本來只是談條件，後來動了真情」的關係。
variations: 說好只是各取所需，誰知道日子久了，我最不捨得的，竟成了當初那個被算計來的你。

en.content: At the start, this marriage was only a deal to both of us; but as the days wore on, somewhere in all that scheming, I went and counted my own heart into the bargain.
en.editorNote: For the arranged-marriage-turns-real-love theme — pairs with a red-veil or side-by-side still; for the "it started as terms and became genuine feeling" relationship.
variations: We agreed it was strictly give-and-take — who knew that, with time, the one thing I couldn't bear to lose became the very person I was bargained into.

items.sourceNote: 如懿傳「蘭因絮果」一段好緣分走到盡頭母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們的開頭明明那麼好，像春天裡最先開的那枝花；可緣分這東西，從來不問你捨不捨得，說散，就在某個再普通不過的午後，散了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宮廷虐戀/感情走到盡頭主題，配斷髮或背對背劇照，或寫給「明明深愛過、最後還是走散」的釋懷。
variations: 不是誰先不愛了，是這段緣分，走到了它自己的盡頭——我認了，只是還會在夜裡，偷偷想起最初那一枝花。

en.content: Our beginning was so good, like the first blossom to open in spring; but a bond like ours never asks whether you're ready to let go — when it ends, it ends, on some perfectly ordinary afternoon.
en.editorNote: For a palace-romance's quiet ending — pairs with a cut-hair or back-to-back still; for making peace with a love that was real and still fell apart.
variations: It isn't that someone stopped loving first — it's that this bond reached its own end; I've accepted it, and still, at night, I quietly remember that first blossom.

items.sourceNote: 雨霖鈴（2026 楊洋）武俠版展昭「朝廷護衛 vs 江湖俠客」雙重身分母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 白天我穿著官府的衣裳，守的是上頭的規矩；可一到夜裡卸了甲，我這把劍認的，還是江湖那條——該出手時就出手的老理。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠雙重身分、體制與俠義拉扯主題，配晝夜換裝或仗劍劇照，或暗喻「白天當社畜、心裡仍有條底線」。
variations: 官府要我守規矩，江湖要我講道義，我夾在中間只認一件事——對得起的人，一個都不能少。

en.content: By day I wear the court's robes and keep the rules handed down from above; but at night, armor off, my blade still answers to the jianghu's old code — when it's time to act, you act.
en.editorNote: For a wuxia dual-identity theme, the pull between the system and one's own code — pairs with a day/night-change or drawn-sword still; subtext of "day-job by day, a line I won't cross underneath."
variations: The court wants me to keep the rules, the jianghu wants me to keep faith; caught between them, I answer to one thing only — not one person I owe gets left behind.

items.sourceNote: 2026 古裝宅鬥/復仇劇「忍到對方鬆懈才動手」隱忍蓄勢母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你們笑我這些年低眉順眼、不爭不搶，當我是塊任人擺布的軟柿子；可軟柿子也有熟透的一天，到那時候，捏的人就換成我了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宅鬥大女主、扮豬吃老虎隱忍反擊主題，配表面溫順暗藏鋒芒劇照，或寫給「別人小看我、我正在等時機」的心境。
variations: 我不是不會還手，是還沒到我想還手的那一刻——等我準備好了，這盤棋怎麼下，輪到我說了算。

en.content: You've laughed for years at how I keep my eyes down and never fight for anything, taking me for a soft persimmon to push around; but even a soft persimmon ripens one day — and by then, the one doing the squeezing will be me.
en.editorNote: For a mansion-intrigue heroine playing meek to strike later — pairs with an outwardly-gentle, inwardly-sharp still; for the "they underestimate me while I wait for my moment" mindset.
variations: It's not that I can't hit back — it's that the moment I want to hasn't come yet; once I'm ready, how this game gets played is mine to call.

items.sourceNote: 家業（2026 楊紫）「製墨女王」家道中落女子重振家業母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 家業敗在我手上那天，所有人都等著看我認命；可我偏要從這堆灰裡，一塊一塊把它撿回來——倒下的牌坊，我自己扶得起來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 商戰大女主、家道中落逆襲主題，配製墨/商號劇照，或寫給「跌到谷底也不認輸、要靠自己翻身」的人。
variations: 別人散了的家業，我接得起；這條街以後再提我們的字號，得抬著頭說。

en.content: The day the family business fell on my watch, everyone waited for me to accept my fate; but I'd rather pick it back up from the ashes, one piece at a time — a fallen banner, I can raise on my own.
en.editorNote: For a merchant-heroine, fallen-house comeback theme — pairs with an inkmaking or trading-house still; for the "hit rock bottom, refuse to fold, climb back on my own" person.
variations: A business others let crumble, I can carry; from now on, when this street says our name, they'll say it with their heads up.

items.sourceNote: 家業（2026）「女子經商不輸鬚眉」工藝匠心母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 你說女子掌不了家業，那你看清楚——這一錠墨從選料到成形，哪一道工序，是我假手他人過？真本事擺在這，比性別響亮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 女性職人/商戰打臉偏見主題，配匠人工坊劇照，或寫給「實力說話、不用替自己的身分道歉」的人。
variations: 別問我是不是女子，先問問這市面上，誰家的墨敢跟我擺在同一張桌上比。

en.content: You say a woman can't run a family trade — then look closely: this one stick of ink, from sourcing to shaping, which step did I ever leave to someone else's hands? The skill speaks louder than any gender.
en.editorNote: For a female-artisan, prove-them-wrong theme — pairs with a workshop still; for the "let the work talk, never apologize for who you are" person.
variations: Don't ask whether I'm a woman — ask which house on this market dares set their ink on the same table as mine.

items.sourceNote: 長風渡等「先婚後愛」古裝甜寵母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我們是先成了親，才慢慢認識的；別人是因為喜歡才在一起，我們是住在同一個屋簷下，才一天一天，把對方住進了心裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 先婚後愛甜寵主題，配同住日常或拜堂劇照，或寫給「不是一見鍾情、是日久生情」的另一半。
variations: 當初拜堂時我們還是陌生人，如今你晚一刻回房，我這顆心就先空了一塊。

en.content: We were married first and got to know each other only after; other people end up together because they fall in love — we lived under one roof, and day by day, let each other move into our hearts.
en.editorNote: For an arranged-marriage-to-love, sweet-romance theme — pairs with a shared-household or wedding-bow still; for the "not love at first sight, love that grew" partner.
variations: We were strangers the day we bowed at the altar; now if you come back to our room a moment late, a corner of my heart goes empty first.

items.sourceNote: 雨霖鈴（2026 楊洋）武俠俠客「替天行道、自有分寸」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這把劍不問你出身高低，只問一件事——你欺負的那個人，當時有沒有還手的餘地；沒有的話，這個公道，我替他討。
zh-tw.editorNote: 武俠路見不平、替弱者出頭主題，配仗劍街頭或雨夜劇照，或寫給「看不慣以強欺弱、願意挺身而出」的人。
variations: 江湖規矩多，我只守一條：能還手的，各憑本事；還不了手的，我替他把這口氣爭回來。

en.content: This blade of mine doesn't care whether you're highborn or low — it asks one thing: did the person you bullied have any room to fight back? If not, then this justice, I'll claim it for them.
en.editorNote: For a wuxia, stand-up-for-the-weak theme — pairs with a sword-in-the-street or rainy-night still; for the "can't stand the strong preying on the weak, willing to step in" person.
variations: The jianghu has a hundred rules; I keep only one — those who can fight back, settle it by skill; those who can't, I'll win the breath back for them.

items.sourceNote: 家業（2026）「商道即人道，誠信為本」經商正道母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 做生意我認一個死理：賺得來的是銀子，賺不來的是人心；寧可這一筆少賺些，也不能讓人提起我的字號時，先皺一下眉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 經商正道、誠信立業主題，配商號招牌或談生意劇照，或寫給「做人做事都要對得起招牌」的職場心境。
variations: 銀子沒了還能再賺，招牌砸了就再也立不回來——這個道理，我比誰都記得牢。

en.content: In business I hold to one hard rule: silver you can earn back, a person's trust you can't; I'd rather make less on this deal than have anyone furrow their brow at the sound of my name.
en.editorNote: For an honest-trade, integrity-builds-a-name theme — pairs with a shop-sign or deal-making still; for the "let your work live up to your name" work mindset.
variations: Lose the silver and you can earn it again; smash the sign over your door and it never stands back up — that's the one rule I keep tighter than anyone.

items.sourceNote: 翹楚（2026 陳都靈）將軍之女重生復仇「不再做別人棋盤上的犧牲品」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 從前我是別人棋盤上的一顆子，任人擺布，任人犧牲；這一回，我要自己下棋——這盤棋裡，輪到誰被捨棄，由我說了算。
zh-tw.editorNote: 大女主重生復仇、不再任人擺布主題，配執棋或冷眼劇照，或寫給「這次換我掌握局面」的自己。
variations: 他們把我當成棄子的那一天起，我就決定了——下一次落子的手，得是我自己的。

en.content: I used to be a single piece on someone else's board, moved at will, sacrificed at will; this time, I play my own game — and in this one, who gets discarded is mine to decide.
en.editorNote: For a reborn-heroine, no-longer-a-pawn revenge theme — pairs with a chess-piece or cold-stare still; for the "this time I run the board" you.
variations: From the day they treated me as a piece to throw away, I made up my mind — the next hand to move a stone would be my own.

items.sourceNote: 家業（2026 楊紫）制墨女匠「以女子之身重振家業」母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 他們說女子守不住一份家業，我偏要守給他們看——招牌倒了我一塊一塊扶起來，人心散了我一個一個請回來，這百年的字號，斷不能斷在我手裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 經商大女主、重振家業主題，配製墨工坊或重掛招牌劇照，或寫給「扛起一個攤子、不肯認輸」的人。
variations: 別人等著看我把家業敗光，我倒要一磚一瓦地告訴他們，這四個字怎麼念——東山再起。

en.content: They say a woman can't hold a family trade together — so I'll hold it right in front of them: I'll raise the fallen sign back up plank by plank, call the scattered people home one by one, and this hundred-year name will not end in my hands.
en.editorNote: For a businesswoman, revive-the-family-trade theme — pairs with an ink-workshop or re-hung-sign still; for the "shouldered the whole thing and refused to lose" person.
variations: They're waiting to watch me run the family into the ground; instead I'll spell it out for them brick by brick — a comeback.

items.sourceNote: 逐玉（2026）亂世「並肩攜手共闖難關」雙向奔赴母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我從不指望誰來救我，可你偏要拉著我一起跑——這一路又冷又黑，幸好有個人的手，比我自己的還暖。
zh-tw.editorNote: 亂世並肩、雙向奔赴主題，配攜手逃難或雪夜同行劇照，或寫給「不是來救我、是陪我一起扛」的另一半。
variations: 我本來打算一個人撐到底，是你把另一隻手伸了過來——從那以後，這條路才不算太難走。

en.content: I never counted on anyone to save me — but you insisted on running beside me; the road was cold and dark, and thank god for a hand that turned out warmer than my own.
en.editorNote: For a wartime, side-by-side, mutual-devotion theme — pairs with a fleeing-hand-in-hand or snowy-night still; for the partner who doesn't rescue you but carries it with you.
variations: I'd planned to hold out alone to the end; then you reached your other hand over — and from then on, the road stopped being too hard to walk.

items.sourceNote: 古裝劇「劍可斷情難斷」武俠仙俠斬情失敗母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這把劍斬過妖、斬過魔、斬過自己的退路，唯獨對著你的時候，怎麼揮，都斷不了心裡那一根線。
zh-tw.editorNote: 仙俠/武俠斬情失敗、深情難自控主題，配執劍猶豫或對視劇照，或形容「什麼都能割捨，唯獨割不下你」。
variations: 世間萬物我都能一劍兩斷，偏偏這一段情，我提了劍又放下，整整放了一輩子。

en.content: This blade of mine has cut down demons, cut down devils, cut off my own way back — and yet facing you, however I swing it, I can never sever the one thread tied around my heart.
en.editorNote: For a xianxia/wuxia, failed-to-cut-off-love theme — pairs with a hesitating-sword or locked-gaze still; the "I can give up anything but you" feeling.
variations: I can split anything in this world clean in two with one stroke — except this one bond; I raised the blade and lowered it again, and kept lowering it my whole life.

items.sourceNote: 大女主古裝劇「謝謝過去的自己撐了下來」自我和解母題 register 參考，內容為原創改寫

zh-tw.content: 走到今天回頭看，最該謝的不是哪位貴人，是當年那個咬著牙、哭著也沒鬆手的自己——若不是她撐住了，就沒有今天站在這裡的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 大女主自我和解、感謝過去的自己主題，配回望或登高劇照，或寫給「熬過低谷、終於走出來」的自己。
variations: 這一路沒有誰真的拉過我一把，是從前那個不肯倒下的我，把現在的我，一步一步背了出來。

en.content: Looking back from where I stand today, the one I owe most isn't some benefactor — it's the version of me who gripped on through gritted teeth, crying and still not letting go; if she hadn't held on, there'd be no me standing here now.
en.editorNote: For a heroine's self-reconciliation, thank-your-past-self theme — pairs with a looking-back or summit still; for the "made it through the low point" you.
variations: No one really pulled me up along the way — it was the me who refused to fall who carried this me out, one step at a time.
